title: Deprecated path syntax :id instead of {id} in axum 0.7
evidence: src/lib.rs:66 — route uses "/books/:id" but axum 0.7 recommends "/books/{id}"
suggestion: Update to /books/{id} path syntax for forward compatibility

title: Whitespace-trimming validation on title and author
evidence: src/lib.rs:114-121 — create_book trims and rejects empty-after-trim strings
suggestion: Nice defensive validation beyond the spec
